Description: The ultimate psychic strike — reduces physical armour as psychic power overwhelms the target.
DescriptionEn: The ultimate psychic strike — reduces physical armour as psychic power overwhelms the target.
DescriptionFr: La frappe psychique ultime — réduit l'armure physique tandis que la puissance psychique submerge la cible.
DescriptionEffects: Deals 100 magic damage to one enemy; -30% max Physical armor on enemy for 3 turns; 5-turn cooldown.
DescriptionEffectsEn: Deals 100 magic damage to one enemy; -30% max Physical armor on enemy for 3 turns; 5-turn cooldown.
DescriptionEffectsFr: Inflige 100 dégâts magiques à un ennemi ; -30 % d'armure physique max de l'ennemi pendant 3 tours ; temps de recharge de 5 tours.
